3.2.1. TÜBİTAK- TEYDEB 1505 University & Industry Collaboration Support Program

Süre:

2 years

Son Başvuru:

Rolling

Bütçe:

In case the customer is in SME scale, 75% of the project budget included in the support is covered by TÜBİTAK and the remaining 25% by the customer. In case the client organization is large-scale at the project application date, 60% of the project budget included in the support is covered by TÜBİTAK and the remaining 40% by the customer. The portion of the project budget to be covered by TÜBİTAK is limited to 2.000.000 TL.

İçerik:

https://tubitak.gov.tr/tr/destekler/sanayi/ulusal-destek-programlari/1505-universite-sanayi-isbirligi-destek-programi

3.2.2. TÜBİTAK- TEYDEB 1515 Frontier R&D Laboratory Support Program

5 years

İçerik:

https://tubitak.gov.tr/tr/destekler/sanayi/ulusal-destek-programlari/1515-oncul-ar-ge-laboratuvarlari-destekleme-programi

up to 1 year; cooperation projects: five years

expected in Sept. 2025

Bütçe:

up to 180,000 euros; cooperation projects up to 1,3 Mio euros

İçerik:

target groups: inter- and intradisciplinary research groups with researchers and partners from (civil) society, intl. participation possible

Transformational Knowledge on Democracies under Change – Transdisciplinary Perspectives | VolkswagenStiftung

Süre:

36 months

Son Başvuru:

3.6.2025

Bütçe:

varies

Süre:

5.7. Gerda Henkel Stiftung - Special Programme Forced Migration

Süre:

36 months

Son Başvuru:

5.5.2025

Bütçe:

varies

İçerik:

Six core areas: 1-Forced-migration infrastructures, 2- South-South (im)mobilities, 3- Multiple displacements, 4- Displaced people’s agency, 5- Gender and intersectionality, 6- (Supra-)state influences on displacement processes

Special Programme Forced Migration | Gerda Henkel Foundation

5.8. Digital Freedom Fund (DFF)

Süre:

6-12 months

Son Başvuru:

TBD - applications on a rolling basis

Bütçe:

Minimum of $10,000 and maximum of $900,000 for a year-long contract.  OTF’s target support ceiling is $300,000; most supported efforts receive between $50,000 and $200,000.

İçerik:

https://www.opentech.fund/funds/internet-freedom-fund/
